use_cases: Displaying status messages like success, error, or warning notifications to users
Showing informational alerts in dashboards or forms
Providing feedback after user actions in SaaS applications
Creating branded alert components with custom color variables
ai_summary: A customizable alert component with multiple variants (primary, secondary, destructive, success, info, warning) and appearance styles (solid, outline, light, stroke). Supports three sizes (lg, md, sm) and uses CSS variables for theming. Designed for displaying status messages and notifications in web applications.
